---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

Describe the problem or limitation you're facing. What are you trying to do that isn't currently possible?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, links, or screenshots relevant to the request.
